calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Allan Horning, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. William Kwok, respondent, appears in Pro Per; Miao Juan Ye, appears in Pro Per. Ivan Zeng & John Zeng, sons of Ms. Ye, appear to help translate Chinese into English and English to Chinese, and to speak as witnesses.
Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative. No new evidence is identified or admitted.
10:00AM
Matter is submitted. All evidence is returned to parties.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
